ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trees" (
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identification number for each tree point. */,
  "blockface_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking each tree to the blockface it is mapped on. */,
  "species" TEXT /* Tree species (e.g., Quercus robur, Pinus sylvestris). */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the tree species (e.g., English Oak, Scots Pine). */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date tree points were collected in the census software. */,
  "tree_dbh" INTEGER /* Diameter of the tree, measured at approximately 54" / 137cm above the ground. */,
  "stump_diam" INTEGER /* Diameter of stump measured through the center, rounded to the nearest inch. */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the tree (e.g., Living, Dead, Stump). */,
  "census_year" INTEGER /* Year of the census during which the tree data was collected. */,
  "tree_height" INTEGER /* Height of the tree in feet or meters. */,
  "canopy_width" INTEGER /* Width of the tree canopy in feet or meters. */,
  "planting_date" TEXT /* Date the tree was planted (if applicable). */,
  "removal_date" TEXT /* Date the tree was removed (if applicable). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trees_census_year FOREIGN KEY ("census_year") REFERENCES census_data ("census_year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trees_blockface_id FOREIGN KEY ("blockface_id") REFERENCES blockfaces ("blockface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blockfaces" (
  "blockface_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blockface. */,
  "blockface_name" TEXT /* Name of the blockface. */,
  "street_name" TEXT /* Name of the street the blockface is on. */,
  "start_intersection" TEXT /* Name of the starting intersection of the blockface. */,
  "end_intersection" TEXT /* Name of the ending intersection of the blockface. */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the blockface. */,
  "blockface_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the blockface (e.g., notes on local ecosystem, hazards). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blockface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_data" (
  "census_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census. */,
  "census_year" INTEGER /* Year of the census. */,
  "census_date" TEXT /* Date the census was conducted. */,
  "census_software" TEXT /* Software used for the census. */,
  "census_notes" TEXT /* Notes and additional information about the census. */,
  "census_methodology" TEXT /* Description of the methodology used during the census (e.g., sampling technique, data validation). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user. */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user. */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user. */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Data Collector, Administrator, Analyst). */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system. */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., Parks and Recreation, Urban Forestry). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tree_census_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry. */,
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tree being logged. */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action. */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., Add, Update, Delete). */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed. */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the action. */,
  "reason_for_update" TEXT /* Reason for the update (e.g., change in tree status, corrected measurement). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tree_census_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tree_census_logs_tree_id FOREIGN KEY ("tree_id") REFERENCES trees ("tree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tree_health" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record. */,
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tree being evaluated. */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Overall health status of the tree (e.g., Good, Fair, Poor). */,
  "maintenance_needs" TEXT /* Description of maintenance needs (e.g., pruning, watering, removal). */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection. */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tree_health_tree_id FOREIGN KEY ("tree_id") REFERENCES trees ("tree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tree_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species. */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species. */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species. */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species. */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the species (e.g., growth habits, characteristics). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tree_plantings" (
  "planting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planting record. */,
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tree being planted. */,
  "planting_date" TEXT /* Date the tree was planted. */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the planting (e.g., blockface, neighborhood). */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the tree being planted. */,
  "planting_method" TEXT /* Method used for planting (e.g., bare root, balled and burlapped). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("planting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tree_plantings_tree_id FOREIGN KEY ("tree_id") REFERENCES trees ("tree_id")
)
